lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Multiple mechanical issues are present and will require repair.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and some small rust spots. The interior shows moderate wear, including minor stains and thinning upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional, though they show signs of age.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a balance of reliability and comfort. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission performs well under all driving conditions. The interior is clean and well-preserved, though you may find minor signs of wear consistent with regular use. On the exterior, the paint retains a nice shine, with only a few small chips and light scratches typical for a car of this age. Overall, it is a solid, dependable vehicle that has been cared for and is ready for the road.
Mint condition.

Looking for a practical and dependable ride? This car is a fantastic option for anyone who values functionality! It has some honest cosmetic wear and signs of use, but it’s a hardworking vehicle that’s ready to hit the road and serve its next owner well.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic attention to be made roadworthy. The engine is currently suffering from a suspected blown head gasket and exhibits significant oil leaks, while the transmission slips noticeably when shifting into higher gears. The exterior shows its age with several deep scratches, visible rust on the quarter panels, and a heavily faded paint finish. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and would be most appropriate for a buyer looking for a major restoration project or a source of spare parts.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies engineering excellence and enduring value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring mechanical integrity and a refined driving experience. Offering a sophisticated balance of performance and comfort, it stands as a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape and runs like a dream. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I've taken really good care of it, and I'd love to see it go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. It's ready for its next adventure—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This example maintains its factory-spec double VANOS system, delivering power via a Getrag 6-speed manual through a variable M-differential lock. Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Fully functional. Ready for immediate use.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and refinement with this exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle. The exterior features a vibrant, polished finish with minimal signs of road wear, complemented by clean lines and well-maintained alloy wheels. Step inside to a spacious, smoke-free interior where the upholstery remains supple and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule that ensures a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. This is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies sustained reliability and consistent performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional value for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both quality and longevity. Secure this distinguished automobile today and experience the hallmark of our professional commitment to automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. This specimen represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven reliability and sophisticated engineering. Rigorously inspected to ensure compliance with our dealership's exacting standards, this vehicle offers an exceptional driving experience consistent with its well-preserved status.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner right away! Perfect for weekend trips or just getting around town with a bit of style. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure dual-VANOS system. The chassis is exceptionally composed, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B16 dampers. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul to ensure internal longevity. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to the variable M-differential. While showing light patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the mechanical integrity is paramount, offering sharp throttle response and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline.
Reliable used car. Clean title. Well-maintained interior and exterior. Mechanically sound. Minimal wear.

This 2018 Lexus RX 350 is a meticulously maintained example that perfectly balances luxury and reliability. Finished in a sophisticated Nebula Gray Pearl, the exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, though I should note a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with normal highway use. Inside, the Parchment leather interior is exceptionally clean and has remained a smoke-free environment; the seats are supple, with only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster. All technological features, including the navigation system, blind-spot monitoring, and premium audio, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is in strong standing, having followed a strict maintenance schedule with full service records available. It recently underwent a comprehensive multi-point inspection and received a fresh oil change. The Michelin tires provide a smooth, quiet ride with plenty of tread remaining. This is a turn-key SUV that has been cared for by a detail-oriented owner and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and performance. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued reliability. A premier choice for those who demand professional-grade quality and lasting value.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Fully inspected to ensure peak performance, this model delivers the reliability and sophistication expected of a high-caliber pre-owned automobile.

Hey there! 🚗 Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? I’m selling my car, and it’s in great shape! It’s been well-loved and runs beautifully, making it perfect for your daily commute or those fun weekend road trips. I’ve really enjoyed every mile in this beauty, and I’m sure you will too. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with six individual throttle bodies. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. To ensure long-term mechanical reliability, the Vanos system has been serviced and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to mitigate common floor pan fatigue. The suspension geometry remains true, providing the sharp turn-in and neutral handling characteristics this chassis is known for. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the powertrain is in excellent health, exhibiting strong compression and linear power delivery all the way to its 8,000 RPM redline.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Recent service complete. Ready for buyer.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both mechanically and aesthetically. The exterior maintains a brilliant luster, showing only the minor character marks one would expect from a well-loved driver. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring leather upholstery that remains soft and supportive with minimal signs of wear. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced according to all manufacturer intervals; most recently, it received a fresh set of premium tires and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. Whether you are commuting or heading out on a long road trip, this car offers a reliable, comfortable, and premium driving experience. It is a solid, turn-key example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, well-preserved automobile that balances performance with sophisticated value. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued excellence on the road, offering a driving experience that remains both robust and refined.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and durability, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality and value without compromise.

I’ve taken great care of it over the years, so it’s in really solid shape and totally ready for its next big adventure. Whether you're just cruising around town or heading out on a long road trip, this ride is ready to go. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have!
